entries.story: As a freelance teacher, I want to communicate with other teachers using a chat function, so that I can learn from them and share experiences.
As a freelance teacher, I want to learn new teaching skills such as communication skills, presentation skills, and confidence, so that I am better prepared for teaching.
As a freelance teacher, I want to learn pedagogical skills such as compassion, collaboration, and inclusiveness, so that I am better prepared for teaching.

As a freelance teacher, I want to complete a skills assessment that tests my teaching/pedagogical/other skill levels, so that I can be placed at the right level without wasting time or feeling frustrated by levels that are too easy or difficult.
As a freelance teacher, I want to navigate through the modules using levels, so that I can track my learning progress.
As a freelance teacher, I want to track my learning progress in a graphical overview such as a progress bar, so that I know what I have learned.
As a freelance teacher, I want to achieve achievements rewarded for completing certain tasks, so that I get a sense of reward for completing something.
As a freelance teacher, I want to do a quiz about a certain topic that is connected to a level or part of a level, so I can test my learning progress.
As a freelance teacher, I want to receive automated feedback on completed quizzes and exercises, so that I can understand what I did right or wrong.
As a freelance teacher, I want to be able to indicate my technical skill level in a small test, so that my profile can reflect my background.
As a freelance teacher, I want to be able to indicate my teaching experience when creating a profile, so that my profile can reflect my background.
As a freelance teacher, I want to be able to indicate my KvK number when creating a profile, so that I can verify that I am a freelance teacher.
As a freelance teacher, I want to have a place with all relevant knowledge for teaching as a knowledge hub, so I can refer back to this when teaching.
As a freelance teacher, I want learning materials to integrate with the subjects I already teach, so that I can incorporate it into my existing curriculum without disruption.
As a freelance teacher, I want to access a collection of study books categorized by ISBN, publisher, topic, and author, so that I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs.
As a freelance teacher, I want to have flashcards available in a digital format, organized by topic and source, so that I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs.
As a freelance teacher, I want to find educational videos organized by platform, URL, topic, year, and author, so that I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs.

As a freelance teacher, I want to have access to research papers with DOI's, journal information, publishing date, topic, and author outlined, so that I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs.
As a freelance teacher, I want to use slides specific to teaching topics, so that I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs.

As a freelance teacher, I want to play different games in different types with clear instructions and measurable learning outcomes, so that I can select the appropriate materials for my learning needs.
As a freelance teacher, I want to access a help section or contact support via a button in the system, so that I can resolve technical issues or system questions I might have.
As a freelance teacher, I want to reset my password securely, so that I can regain access to the system in case I forget it.
As a freelance teacher, I want to update my profile information, so that my details stay current and accurate.
As a freelance teacher, I want to receive email notifications about my progress and new learning opportunities, so that I am always updated.
As an administrator, I want to check if KvK numbers are real by checking the profiles, to verify the user as a freelance teacher.

As an administrator, I want to approve or reject freelance teacher profiles after reviewing their details and checking their KvK numbers, so that only verified freelance teachers can access the system.
As an administrator, I want to create learning modules in the system, so that I can organize and manage content for freelance teachers.
As an administrator, I want to create different levels within the modules in the system, so that I can define different tiers of difficulty for users.
As an administrator, I want to create quizzes in the system related to a certain module in the system, so that freelance teachers can track their learning progress.
As an administrator, I want to remove inappropriate or outdated content, so that the system stays relevant and compliant.
As an administrator, I want to edit inappropriate or outdated content, so that the system stays relevant and compliant.
As an administrator, I want to be able to add videos related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to manage videos related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to add books related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to manage books related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to add research papers related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to manage research papers related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to add slides related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to manage slides related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to add flashcards related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to manage flashcards related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to add games related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to be able to manage games related to a certain module in the system, so that I can provide users with relevant educational content.
As an administrator, I want to have an overview of data usage of freelance teachers, so that I can manage the active users.
As an administrator, I want to send system-wide announcements or updates about system-specific events, so that all users are informed of changes or news.
